description: Domain delete is Destroy: confirm alone is blocked by the bypass gate, and a bypass DELETEs the domain. Missing-id rejection diverges (Go checks id before the gate, Python checks confirm before id) so it is left out; see report.

cases.name: confirm alone is blocked by the destroy gate
cases.expect_error:
linode_domain_delete is destructive. Either:
  1. Call with dry_run: true first to preview, then call again with
     confirm: true, confirmed_dry_run: true
  2. Call with confirm: true, confirm_bypass_dry_run: true to skip preview
  3. Use yolo: true (only if profile allows)
